Bus Timings

RTA Urban Buses: Comprehensive Routes and Schedule Information

September 28, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s extensive public bus network, operated by the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA), plays a crucial role in the city’s transport system. With a fleet of over 1,500 buses covering 82% of metropolitan areas, the RTA ensures efficient connectivity across various zones. This article provides a comprehensive overview of the RTA’s urban bus routes, fare structures, facilities, and essential guidelines for navigating Dubai’s bustling transit system.

Urban Bus Routes

Here is a selection of key urban bus routes in Dubai:

Bus ID From To
5 Abu Hail MS Union Square Bus Station
6 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Dubai Healthcare City
7 Al Quoz Bus Station Al Satwa
8 Al Baraha Bus Station Ibn Battuta Bus Station
9 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Business Bay MS
10 Gold Souq Bus Station Al Quoz Bus Station
11A Gold Souq Bus Station Al Awir Immigration
11B Al Rashidiya Bus Station Al Awir Immigration
12 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Al Quoz Bus Station
13 Gold Souq Bus Station Al Qusais DM Housing
13A Gold Souq Bus Station Al Qusais Bus Station
13D Gold Souq Bus Station Al Qusais Bus Station
14 Oud Metha Bus Station Safa Terminus
15 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Al Khail Gate
17 Al Sabkha Bus Station Muhaisnah 4, Wasl Oasis 2
18 Al Nahda 1 Muhaisnah 4
19 Al Nahda 1 Al Qusais
20 Al Warsan 3 Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2
21 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Al Quoz Industrial Area
22 Deira City Center Bus Station Al Nahda 1
23 Oud Metha Bus Station Al Nahda 1
24 Al Nahda 2 International City Bus Station
26 Oud Metha Bus Station Business Bay 2 Bus Station
27 Gold Souq Bus Station The Dubai Mall
28 The Dubai Mall Oud Metha Bus Station
29 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station The Dubai Mall
30 Dubai Mall MS Dubai Sky Courts
31 Airport Terminal 2 Oud Al Mateena
32C Al Qusais Bus Station Al Satwa Bus Station
33 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Al Qusais Bus Station
34 Etisalat MS Al Khawaneej 2
43 Gold Souq Bus Station Al Qusais Industrial Area 2
44 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Al Rashidiya Bus Station
50 International City Bus Station Al Khail Gate 1
53 Gold Souq Bus Station International City
55 Al Satwa Bus Station International City
56 Danube Metro Station DWC, Staff Village
61 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Ras Al Khor Samari Residence
61D Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Nad Al Shiba Clinic
62 Al Qusais Industrial Area 5 Ras Al Khor Vegetable Market
63E Al Qusais Bus Station Al Quoz Bus Station
64 Gold Souq Bus Station Ras Al Khor
64A Gold Souq Bus Station Ras Al Khor Samari Residence
66 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Al Faqa
68 Lehbab First Park Seeh Al Salam
67 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Dubai Endurance City
77 Baniyas MS Al Garhoud, RTA HQ
81 The Dubai Mall Mall Of Emirates Bus Station
83 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Al Khail MS
84 Al Khail Gate Jumeirah Beach Residence Station
88 Deira City Center Bus Station Dubai Internet City MS
91 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Jebel Ali Bus Station
93 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Mall Of Emirates Bus Station
95 Al Baraha Bus Station Jebel Ali Waterfront Labour Camp
95A Ibn Battuta Bus Station Jebel Ali Waterfront Labour Camp
96 Al Quoz Bus Station DIP
97 Al Qusais Bus Station Jebel Ali Industrial Area 7
98E Al Quoz Bus Station Al Satwa
99 Jebel Ali Bus Station UAE Exchange MS
110 Al Safa Metro Station Al Quoz Creative
310 Al Rashidiya Bus Station International City
320 Al Rashidiya Bus Station Academic City
367 Etisalat MS Silicon Oasis
D03 Dubai Mall MS Dubai Design District
DPR1 Ibn Battuta Bus Station Dubai Parks and Resorts
DS1 Expo 2020 MS Dubai South
J01 Mall Of Emirates Bus Station Jumeirah Village Circle
J02 IMPZ Mira
J03 Dubai Studio City Damac Hills
J04 Dubai Studio City Remraam
JLT1 Sobha Realty MS JLT, Damas
JLT2 DMCC MS JLT, Silver Tower
SM1 Gold Souq Bus Station Souq Al Marfa Deira

For detailed information on specific routes and schedules, consult the RTA website or visit one of their Customer Happiness Centres.

Dubai Bus Fares

Dubai is divided into seven fare zones. Bus fares depend on the number of zones traveled. Transfers between buses, metro, trams, and water buses within 30 minutes are considered a single trip. Fares using NOL cards are as follows:

Card Type 1 Zone 2 Adjacent Zones More than 2 Zones
Silver Card AED 3 AED 5 AED 7.5
Gold Card AED 6 AED 10 AED 15
Blue Personal Card AED 3 AED 5 AED 7.5
Red Card (Ticket) AED 4 AED 6 AED 8.5

Discounts are available for students, senior citizens, and People of Determination, while penalties apply for using invalid or fake NOL cards.

Facilities in RTA Dubai Buses

Dubai’s RTA buses and bus stations offer various facilities:

  • Information screens at stops and on buses
  • Dedicated spaces for People of Determination
  • Separate sections for females, children, and families
  • Vending machines, cafeterias, and NOL top-up machines at main stops
  • Parking spaces for bicycles and taxis
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

General Guidelines

  • Reserved seats for ladies and children

  • No eating, drinking, smoking, or littering on buses
  • No heavy luggage or animals allowed
  • Avoid noise disturbances and musical instruments

RTA Dubai Contact Information

  • Email: ASK@rta. ae

  • Phone: 800-90-90
  • Address: Roads & Transport Authority, P. O. Box: 118899, Dubai, UAE

For further assistance, visit RTA Customer Happiness Centres located in Deira, Al Aweer, Al Kifaf, Umm Ramool, Al Twar, Al Barsha, and Al Manarah.

Comparison of RTA Dubai Bus Route Types

Bus Route Type Purpose Coverage Area Key Characteristics
RTA Dubai Express Bus Routes Fast and direct connections to major destinations Major hubs and key locations within Dubai Fewer stops; faster travel time; prefixed with “E”
RTA Dubai Feeder Bus Routes Connects residential areas to main metro stations Residential neighborhoods and metro stations Smaller, local routes feeding into larger transport systems
RTA Urban CBD Bus Routes Serves the Central Business District (CBD) Central business areas of Dubai High frequency; caters to office commuters
RTA Urban Bus Routes General city transportation Various city areas across Dubai Extensive network; connects different neighborhoods and commercial areas
RTA Intercity Routes Links Dubai to neighboring cities Routes to cities like Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, etc. Longer routes; prefixed with “E” for intercity travel

Navigating Dubai’s urban areas is made convenient with the RTA’s well-structured bus routes and services. By understanding the fare system, utilizing available facilities, and adhering to general guidelines, commuters can enjoy a smooth travel experience. For detailed route information and further assistance, the RTA offers multiple contact options and customer service centers throughout the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 28, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
